        // [Expressive]
        // public static int? NullableValueType(object? input) => (int? )input;
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<object, int?>> NullableValueType_P0_object_Expression() 
        {
            var p_input = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(object), "input");
            var expr_0 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Convert(p_input, typeof(int?)); // (int?)input
            return global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Lambda<global::System.Func<object, int?>>(expr_0, p_input);
        }
